headline: Equity Data Science (EDS) Appoints Sebastian Lonza as Chief Revenue Officer to Accelerate Growth Across Institutional Markets
summary: NEW YORK, May 29, 2026--Equity Data Science (EDS), a leading provider of Investment Process Management (IPM) solutions for hedge funds and asset managers, today announced the appointment of Sebastian Lonza, CFA, CAIA as Chief Revenue Officer (CRO). Lonza joins EDS with deep expertise across portfolio analytics, risk management, and enterprise technology, bringing over a decade of experience helping institutional investors modernize their investment workflows.

content.title: Equity Data Science (EDS) Appoints Sebastian Lonza as Chief Revenue Officer to Accelerate Growth Across Institutional Markets
content.summary: NEW YORK, May 29, 2026--Equity Data Science (EDS), a leading provider of Investment Process Management (IPM) solutions for hedge funds and asset managers, today announced the appointment of Sebastian Lonza, CFA, CAIA as Chief Revenue Officer (CRO). Lonza joins EDS with deep expertise across portfolio analytics, risk management, and enterprise technology, bringing over a decade of experience helping institutional investors modernize their investment workflows.

headline: India Doubled Tariffs on Silver and Gold Imports To Protect a Plunging Rupee; Will Foreign US Treasury Bond Dumping Cause the US To Follow Suit?
summary: In Mid-May, India’s Prime Minister Narendra Modi publicly urged Indian citizens to avoid buying physical gold and silver for a year. Soon afterwards, India increased its import tariffs on precious metals from 6% to 15%. This is yet another sign that the physical silver shortage is escalating, which should bode well for ETFs that hold ... India Doubled Tariffs on Silver and Gold Imports To Protect a Plunging Rupee; Will Foreign US Treasury Bond Dumping Cause the US To Follow Suit?
